title: These mid-cap stocks with ‘Strong Buy’ & ‘Buy’ recos can rally over 25%, according to analysts
summary: In 1990, when the first Gulf War took place, it was code named “Operation Desert Storm”. In 2003, it was called “Operation Iraqi Freedom”. This time, the name is different. Yet, given that the stock market as well as the macro picture of the Indian economy have changed, the reaction of investors should be different.
